goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'east'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'postcode', and 'attraction type'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'hamilton lodge'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'postcode', and 'hotel type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.
